Two critical issues for power users: system prompt bloat + premature auto-compression - Google Antigravity - Google AI Developers Forum
Google AI Developers Forum
Two critical issues for power users: system prompt bloat + premature auto-compression
Google Antigravity
prompt
g00gle-devs-trash
March 20, 2026,  7:54am
1
Spending tens of hours weekly in Antigravity. Two issues killing productivity:
1. ~1200 lines of hardcoded system instructions
that override my custom rules and can’t be removed. User rules should be supreme — let us disable system prompt sections we don’t need.
2. Auto-compression at 100-200k tokens
on models with 1M context. No toggle, no threshold setting. Long sessions lose all accumulated context. Let users control this.
These compound — bloated system prompt eats tokens faster, triggering compression sooner. Both need user-facing controls.
